name: Demon Slayer
description: Tanjiro, Nezuko, the Hashira, and the hunt for Muzan Kibutsuji — Kimetsu no Yaiba in 20 questions.

questions.q: Who is the protagonist of 'Demon Slayer'?
Tanjiro's younger sister is turned into a demon in the very first episode. What is her name?

source.notes: Notable for keeping enough humanity to wear a bamboo muzzle and protect her brother.

questions.q: Who is the original demon and central villain of the series?

source.notes: All other demons descend from his blood.

questions.q: What is the title of the original Japanese manga and anime?
Who created the 'Demon Slayer' manga?

source.notes: Manga ran 2016–2020 in Weekly Shōnen Jump.

questions.q: In what historical era of Japan is the story set?

source.notes: 1912–1926 — the era of early electric lights, trains, and Western dress alongside traditional swords.

questions.q: What is the name of the elite organization that fights demons?
What is the name of the ranks of the most elite demons under Muzan?

source.notes: Six Upper Moons + Six Lower Moons.

questions.q: What is the name of the special swords wielded by Demon Slayers?

source.notes: Forged from sun-absorbing 'scarlet crimson iron sand' that can decapitate demons.

questions.q: What is the only natural light that kills demons?

source.notes: Beheading with a Nichirin blade also works.

questions.q: Which extremely rare flower is harvested for a poison Muzan fears?

source.notes: Muzan was originally seeking it to cure his disease — he is the reason demons exist.

questions.q: What is the title of the most powerful slayers in the Demon Slayer Corps?

source.notes: Hashira translates to 'pillar.' Typically nine at a time, one per Breathing style; the actual lineup fluctuates as Hashira die or retire. audit-corrected 2026-05-09: softened 'nine at any given time' to reflect canon.

questions.q: Who is the Water Hashira at the start of the series, and Tanjiro's first ally?
Who is the Flame Hashira who fights Upper Moon Three Akaza on the Mugen Train?

source.notes: Rengoku is killed but inflicts grievous wounds; the loss devastates Tanjiro and the Corps.

questions.q: Which Hashira is the flamboyant 'Sound Hashira', a former shinobi?

source.notes: Featured in the Entertainment District Arc.

questions.q: Which loud-mouthed wild boy wears a boar's head as a mask?

source.notes: Raised by boars; uses a self-taught Beast Breathing style.

questions.q: Which demon slayer is a sleeping coward who unleashes Thunder Breathing only when unconscious?

source.notes: Master of the first form: Thunderclap and Flash.

questions.q: What was the original breathing style of Tanjiro's family — passed down through generations?

source.notes: Hinokami Kagura is in fact the original Sun Breathing — the first breathing style, parent to all others.

questions.q: What was the title of the 2020 anime film that became the highest-grossing Japanese film of all time?

source.notes: Grossed over $500M worldwide; surpassed Spirited Away's box office in Japan.

questions.q: What is the name of the dimensional fortress controlled by the demon Nakime, where the final battle takes place?

source.notes: Muzan's lair; setting for much of the final arc and the upcoming film trilogy.
